data.title: PepGen Inc. Announces Public Offering Agreement
data.description:
PepGen Inc. ( (PEPG) ) just unveiled an update.

On September 24, 2025, PepGen Inc. announced an underwriting agreement with Leerink Partners LLC and Stifel, Nicolaus & Company, Incorporated for a public offering of 31,250,000 shares of its common stock at $3.20 per share. The underwriters exercised an option to purchase an additional 4,687,500 shares, bringing the estimated net proceeds to $107.6 million. The funds will be used to support ongoing research and clinical trials, including FREEDOM-DM1 and FREEDOM2-DM1, as well as general corporate purposes. The offering is expected to close on or about September 26, 2025, pending customary closing conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (PEPG) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PepGen Inc. stock, see the PEPG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PEPG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PEPG is a Underperform.

PepGen Inc.’s overall score reflects significant financial challenges, with limited revenue and continued losses. While technical indicators are mixed, the valuation remains unattractive due to negative earnings. Recent corporate events, including promising trial results and board expansions, offer some positive momentum but are insufficient to offset the financial concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on PEPG stock, click here.

More about PepGen Inc.

PepGen Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing next-generation oligonucleotide therapies aimed at transforming the treatment of severe neuromuscular and neurological diseases. The company’s Enhanced Delivery Oligonucleotide (EDO) platform utilizes cell-penetrating peptides to enhance the uptake and activity of conjugated oligonucleotide therapeutics, targeting the root causes of serious diseases.

Average Trading Volume: 2,949,057

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $87.25M

data.title: Spheria Emerging Companies Reports Estimated Pre-Tax NTA
data.description:
An announcement from Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. ( (AU:SEC) ) is now available.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited announced an estimated pre-tax Net Tangible Asset (NTA) backing per share of $2.630 as of September 25, 2025. This figure, which is unaudited and approximate, reflects the daily value of the company’s investment portfolio and cash balances, adjusted for fees and estimated changes in operating costs and taxes. The announcement provides stakeholders with insight into the company’s financial health and asset management efficiency, although it does not account for unrealized gains or losses.

More about Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited operates in the investment industry, focusing on managing a portfolio of emerging companies. The company provides investment opportunities and financial services, primarily targeting growth and value in smaller, emerging market companies.

Average Trading Volume: 60,229

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Ragnar Metals Limited Releases Corporate Governance Statement for 2025
data.description:
The latest update is out from Ragnar Metals Limited ( (AU:RAG) ).

Ragnar Metals Limited has released its corporate governance statement for the financial year ending June 30, 2025, which is available on their website. The statement outlines the company’s adherence to the ASX Corporate Governance Council’s principles and recommendations, including board responsibilities, director appointments, and accountability measures. This disclosure is crucial for maintaining transparency and trust with stakeholders, ensuring that the company meets regulatory requirements and upholds best practices in corporate governance.

More about Ragnar Metals Limited

Ragnar Metals Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is primarily engaged in identifying and extracting valuable minerals, contributing to the supply chain of raw materials for various industrial applications.

data.title: Mobile-health Network Solutions Completes $900,000 Share Sale with Indopacific
data.description:

On September 17, 2025, Mobile-health Network Solutions successfully completed the Second SPA with Indopacific Health Investment Corporation Pte. Ltd., issuing 500,000 class A ordinary shares at $1.80 per share, resulting in proceeds of $900,000. This transaction marks a significant financial milestone for the company, potentially enhancing its market position and providing additional capital to support its strategic initiatives.

data.title: China Ever Grand Financial Leasing Group Faces Board Vacancy After Director’s Passing
data.description:
China Ever Grand Financial Leasing Group Co., Ltd. ( (HK:0379) ) has provided an update.

China Ever Grand Financial Leasing Group Co., Ltd. announced the passing of Ms. Yip Man Yi, a non-executive director and member of the nomination committee. Her passing leaves the company non-compliant with Hong Kong Stock Exchange rules requiring gender diversity on the board. The company is actively seeking a suitable female candidate to fill the vacancy and restore compliance within three months.

More about China Ever Grand Financial Leasing Group Co., Ltd.

China Ever Grand Financial Leasing Group Co., Ltd. operates in the financial leasing industry, focusing on providing leasing solutions and financial services. The company is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and aims to cater to a diverse market with its financial products.

data.title: Juventus Issues €150 Million Bond to Optimize Debt Structure
data.description:
An update from Juventus Football Club Spa ( (IT:JUVE) ) is now available.

Juventus Football Club S.p.A. has issued a €150 million non-convertible bond with a fixed interest rate of 4.15%, maturing in September 2037. This issuance aims to optimize the company’s financial debt structure by increasing the average duration and fixed-rate portion, while potentially reducing the average cost of debt. The bond, fully subscribed by PGIM, highlights Juventus’ creditworthiness and is expected to support a progressive reduction in financial debt over the medium to long term.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:JUVE) stock is a Hold with a EUR3.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Juventus Football Club Spa stock, see the IT:JUVE Stock Forecast page.

More about Juventus Football Club Spa

Juventus Football Club S.p.A. operates in the sports and entertainment industry, primarily focused on professional football. The company is known for its football team, Juventus F.C., which competes in top-tier leagues and tournaments, and it engages in related commercial activities.

data.title: Majestic Ideal Holdings Ltd Rebrands to Ping An Biomedical Co., Ltd.
data.description:
Majestic Ideal Holdings Ltd ( (MJID) ) just unveiled an update.

On September 12, 2025, the shareholders of Majestic Ideal Holdings Ltd approved a proposal to change the company’s name to Ping An Biomedical Co., Ltd. This change reflects a strategic rebranding effort and the company’s ordinary shares are set to begin trading under the new name and ticker symbol ‘PASW’ on the Nasdaq Stock Market starting September 30, 2025. The CUSIP number for the shares will remain unchanged, indicating a seamless transition for stakeholders.

More about Majestic Ideal Holdings Ltd

data.title: Heng Tai Consumables Group Updates Nomination Committee Terms
data.description:
Heng Tai Consumables Group ( (HK:0197) ) just unveiled an update.

Heng Tai Consumables Group Limited has outlined the terms of reference for its Nomination Committee, which was initially established in 2005 and has undergone several amendments. The committee is responsible for reviewing the board’s structure, size, and composition, identifying and recommending qualified individuals for board positions, assessing the independence of directors, and supporting board performance evaluations. This announcement highlights the company’s commitment to maintaining a diverse and effective board, which is crucial for its corporate strategy and governance.
